summary: Data Isolation Bug Fixes verified - ALL 12 tests PASS. Fixed missing 'source' field in ContactCreate model. All 4 critical data isolation issues now working correctly: _id returns as string, ownership_type auto-assigned based on source, photos filtered by user_id, system tasks use user_id filter.
critical_code_review_comments: contacts.py line 101: _id correctly converted to str(result.inserted_id) - VERIFIED
contacts.py lines 83-87: ownership_type correctly auto-assigned based on source - VERIFIED
contacts.py line 887: congrats_filter includes 'user_id': user_id for photo isolation - VERIFIED (code structure correct)
tasks.py line 781-785: generate_system_tasks now uses {'user_id': user_id} instead of get_data_filter - VERIFIED
models.py: FIXED - Added 'source' field to ContactCreate model (was missing, causing phone_import to be ignored)
seed_data_creation: Test contacts created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 data isolation issues are now fixed and tested. The ContactCreate model was missing the 'source' field which prevented phone_import from setting ownership_type='personal'. This has been fixed. Backend tests cover: _id as string, ownership_type auto-assignment, photo isolation, and system task isolation.

features_verified.contact_creation_returns_id_as_string: PASS - _id is a 24-char hex string, not ObjectId
features_verified.contact_id_usable_for_redirect: PASS - Returned _id can be used directly in GET endpoint
features_verified.phone_import_sets_personal_ownership: PASS - source='phone_import' → ownership_type='personal' (fixed by adding source field to ContactCreate)
features_verified.default_source_is_manual: PASS - No source → defaults to 'manual' and ownership_type='org'
features_verified.congrats_filter_includes_user_id: PASS - Congrats cards filtered by user_id in photo aggregation
features_verified.generate_system_tasks_uses_user_id_filte: PASS - Only creates tasks for user's OWN contacts
features_verified.task_summary_filters_by_user_id: PASS - Summary counts only tasks with matching user_id
features_verified.get_tasks_filters_by_user_id: PASS - All returned tasks belong to the requesting user
features_verified.dormant_contacts_only_checks_user_contac: PASS - Dormant check uses user_id, not org-wide filter
features_verified.tasks_isolated_by_user: PASS - Tasks created for user A only visible to user A

bug_fix_applied.description: Added 'source' field to ContactCreate Pydantic model. This field was missing, causing the source parameter sent by clients to be stripped during validation. The backend code in contacts.py was correct but never received the source value.
bug_fix_applied.line_added: source: str = 'manual'  # manual, csv, phone_import, lead_form, referral, api, dms, crm
